history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a floor cell ('.'). The goal G is located two steps ahead and two steps to the right, but there are lava cells in between. By moving forward first, I can then navigate around the lava to reach the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (north) is a floor cell ('.'). The goal G is located two steps north and two steps east of my current position. I can safely move forward one step to reach the free cell, then continue east toward the goal. No lava is directly ahead.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at position (3,5) facing north. The cell directly north is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. The goal G is located two cells to the east at (5,5), with an empty floor cell (4,5) in between. To move east, I need to turn right first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing east. The cell directly in front of me (one step east) is a floor cell, and two steps east is the goal G. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal without immediate danger.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly in front of me (above). The cell in front is G, which is a safe goal cell. I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
